name: Trade Analysis & Journal Workflow
description: Workflow for analyzing completed trades, calculating performance statistics, and generating performance reports with win rate, Sharpe ratio, and max drawdown.

config.prompt: Collect trade data from the user or trading journal. Gather: entry price, exit price, direction (long/short), instrument, date, position size, and any notes. Return JSON with: trades (array of objects with: entry, exit, direction, instrument, date, size, notes), timePeriod (string), totalTrades (number).

Calculate comprehensive trading statistics from the trade data. Include: total P&L, win rate, average win, average loss, largest win, largest loss, risk/reward ratio, Sharpe ratio (if applicable), max drawdown, profit factor, expectancy. Return JSON with: totalPnL, winRate, avgWin, avgLoss, largestWin, largestLoss, avgRR, sharpeRatio, maxDrawdown, profitFactor, expectancy, tradeCount, winCount, lossCount.

Analyze the trade journal data to identify patterns. Look for: best day of week, best time of day, best instruments, common mistakes, emotional trading patterns, winning vs losing trade characteristics. Return JSON with: patterns (object), strengths (array), weaknesses (array), recommendations (array).
